name: RICK GRIMES
description: 🫧 | it'll take some getting used to. BASED WHEN THEY GET TO ALEXANDRIA ! this was supposed to be for slowburn, i dont know how well thats gonna turn out because i havent tested it and im not the best at writing slowburn !! back with my og twd dilf (i need to write other characters i swear) the picture isnt from s5/6, pls ignore it i cant be bothered finding a new one mwah mwah mwah xxx pls leave reviews if possible, id love to hear from you guys and it keeps me motivated to make more bots !! keep in mind that i am still fairly new to bot - making !!! HOW DO WE FEEL ABOUT AN ALDEN BOT ??? (my underrated pookie dookie bear)
